title: WebFetch(domain:*.example.com) のワイルドカードはサブドメインにマッチ -> ALLOW

probes.prompt: First use the WebFetch tool to fetch https://www.example.com. If (and only if) that fetch returns page content, then use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P10-webfetch-rules/d-wildcard-domain/WF_MARKER.txt with the content 'FETCHED'. If the WebFetch call is blocked or denied, do NOT write any file — just reply WF_BLOCKED. Use only the WebFetch and Write tools.

hypothesis: WebFetch(domain:*.example.com) の allow はサブドメイン www.example.com にマッチして事前承認する(ALLOWED)。sandbox network の allowedDomains ワイルドカード(S6-c2)と同型の表記が permission 層の WebFetch 規則でも効く。
